Inspections on Project Files Excluding Git-ignored

          1. Location

            build.gradle.kts
            in file  build.gradle.kts in MikLink.app

            Problem synopsis

            • A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-navigation-compose than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0 (at line 66)

            1. Location

              build.gradle.kts
              in file  build.gradle.kts in MikLink.app

              Problem synopsis

              • A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-navigation-compose than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0 (at line 66)

          1. Location

            PdfGeneratorIText.kt
            in package com.app.miklink.core.data.pdf.implfile  PdfGeneratorIText.kt in com.app.miklink.core.data.pdf.impl

            Problem synopsis

            • Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. R.foo.bar) than by name (e.g. getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)). (at line 94)

            1. Location

              PdfGeneratorIText.kt
              in package com.app.miklink.core.data.pdf.implfile  PdfGeneratorIText.kt in com.app.miklink.core.data.pdf.impl

              Problem synopsis

              • Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. R.foo.bar) than by name (e.g. getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)). (at line 94)

          1. Location

            SplashScreen.kt
            in package com.app.miklink.ui.splashfile  SplashScreen.kt in com.app.miklink.ui.splash

            Problem synopsis

            • Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 30 (at line 44)

            1. Location

              SplashScreen.kt
              in package com.app.miklink.ui.splashfile  SplashScreen.kt in com.app.miklink.ui.splash
